why gals who graduate?

where gals who began

gals who started as a single Facebook group for women navigating life after university — new cities, new jobs, and the strange quiet after your friends scatter across the country.

it's still that today: a space to ask the questions you can't ask your parents, celebrate the small wins, and find the gals figuring it out right alongside you.
